reference: Yes, I keep having pain in my lower back. I had a lumbar laminectomy years ago due to a fall. Lately, though, I am experiencing pain in my knee, and now it has moved to my right side. I feel the pain coming from the area that was affected. I am also experiencing stiffness and pain in my hands, particularly in my knuckles and my left thumb, but I do not remember banging it.
text: Yes, I keep having pain in my lower back. I had a lumbar laminectomy years ago due to a fall. Lately, though, I am experiencing pain in my knee, and now it has moved to my right side. I feel the pain coming from the area that was affected. I am also experiencing stiffness and pain in my hands, particularly in my knuckles and my left thumb. But I do not remember banging it.
